microsoft_ft: Served as the **primary technical voice** for Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp partnerships, defining and directing Azure's resilience validation strategy across large enterprise accounts to drive **$14M+ in business impact**.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, translating enterprise requirements into self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by **30%** and scaled execution across 45+ annual drills.
Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as technical lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract.

Built an **AI agent** to automate resilience drill planning, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — demonstrating applied ML/AI to drive data-driven operational transformation.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability, achieving a **94% recovery rate** in 4 months and establishing a repeatable validation model adopted across enterprise customer segments.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows by conducting live demos and training sessions across 14 Azure service teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and accelerating data-driven development practices.

Influenced the product roadmap toward **intent-based YAML generation** by facilitating 11+ discovery interviews with enterprise engineering teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and aligning technical strategy to user needs.

Accelerated data retrieval by **83%** by migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search platform, establishing metadata standards that improved data integrity across large-scale internal knowledge bases.
microsoft_2022: **Generated $3M** in accelerated revenue and launched Azure regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ enterprise service teams.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built and socialized a roadmap to automate critical paths — directly enabling data-driven operational transformation at scale.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to surface automation gaps and track operational toil across 140+ teams, equipping leadership with the data intelligence needed to prioritize high-impact investments.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and aligning cross-functional engineering and operations stakeholders.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a scalable, repeatable release model.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **resolving 40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and sustain delivery velocity across a large distributed team.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a CRM workflow that gave leadership real-time pipeline visibility and accelerated close rates.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy, optimizing digital channels and using performance analytics to guide investment decisions.

Conducted financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, delivering actionable pricing recommendations that improved leadership's data-driven decision-making on future bids.
